productDisplayName: John Players Men Polo Navy Blue T-shirt
description: Style note Crafted from cotton knit, this polo T-shirt from john players is designed to offer exemplary comfort and style. The vibrant colour ups your energy factor, while the ribbed cuffs sit snug on well-toned arms. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Product Details Navy blue polo neck T-shirt, chest buttoned placket, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, graphic print and stitched detailing on the left side and a vented hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry flat in shade inside out Warm iron Size and Fit Slim Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
